raw_text:
72. Manufacturing Process Consultant (Tooling)

Job Summary  
Advises on optimizing manufacturing processes related to tooling for better efficiency, 
quality, and cost reduction.  
Key Respo nsibilities  
• Analyze manufacturing processes and workflows  
• Identify inefficiencies and recommend improvements  
• Implement lean manufacturing and process optimization  
• Improve tooling utilization and productivity  
• Conduct process audits and training  
• Support digital transformation initiatives  
Required Skills  
• Process engineering and lean manufacturing expertise  
• Data analysis and problem -solving  
• Knowledge of tooling and machining processes  
• Strong communication and consulting skills  
Qualification  
• B.E / B.Tech in Mechanical / Production (MBA preferred)  
Experience  
• 8–18+ years  
Earnings (India)  
• ₹2,000 – ₹7,000 per hour  
• ₹1,50,000 – ₹8,00,000 per project
